'''âch-d-v-dh''' ('''kachadvedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:charge|charge]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-d-v-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:charge|charge]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âch-d-v-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kachadvedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichadvedhoko|thichadvedhoko]] || [[word:jichadvedhoko|jichadvedhoko]] || [[word:shichadvedhoko|shichadvedhoko]] || [[word:kichadvedhoko|kichadvedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchadvedhoko|thuthuchadvedhoko]] || [[word:jujuchadvedhoko|jujuchadvedhoko]] || [[word:shushuchadvedhoko|shushuchadvedhoko]] || [[word:kukuchadvedhoko|kukuchadvedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchadvedhoko|thuchadvedhoko]] || [[word:juchadvedhoko|juchadvedhoko]] || [[word:shuchadvedhoko|shuchadvedhoko]] || [[word:kuchadvedhoko|kuchadvedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchadvedhoko|thuchadvedhoko]] || [[word:juchadvedhoko|juchadvedhoko]] || [[word:shuchadvedhoko|shuchadvedhoko]] || [[word:kuchadvedhoko|kuchadvedhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechadvedhoko|thechadvedhoko]] || [[word:jechadvedhoko|jechadvedhoko]] || [[word:shechadvedhoko|shechadvedhoko]] || [[word:kechadvedhoko|kechadvedhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochadvedhoko|thothochadvedhoko]] || [[word:jojochadvedhoko|jojochadvedhoko]] || [[word:shoshochadvedhoko|shoshochadvedhoko]] || [[word:kokochadvedhoko|kokochadvedhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochadvedhoko|thochadvedhoko]] || [[word:jochadvedhoko|jochadvedhoko]] || [[word:shochadvedhoko|shochadvedhoko]] || [[word:kochadvedhoko|kochadvedhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochadvedhoko|thochadvedhoko]] || [[word:jochadvedhoko|jochadvedhoko]] || [[word:shochadvedhoko|shochadvedhoko]] || [[word:kochadvedhoko|kochadvedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠchadvedhoko|thĂŠchadvedhoko]] || [[word:jĂŠchadvedhoko|jĂŠchadvedhoko]] || [[word:shĂŠchadvedhoko|shĂŠchadvedhoko]] || [[word:kĂŠchadvedhoko|kĂŠchadvedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachadvedhoko|thathachadvedhoko]] || [[word:jajachadvedhoko|jajachadvedhoko]] || [[word:shashachadvedhoko|shashachadvedhoko]] || [[word:kakachadvedhoko|kakachadvedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachadvedhoko|thachadvedhoko]] || [[word:jachadvedhoko|jachadvedhoko]] || [[word:shachadvedhoko|shachadvedhoko]] || [[word:kachadvedhoko|kachadvedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachadvedhoko|thachadvedhoko]] || [[word:jachadvedhoko|jachadvedhoko]] || [[word:shachadvedhoko|shachadvedhoko]] || [[word:kachadvedhoko|kachadvedhoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shachadvedhithi|shachadvedhithi]] || [[word:shachadvedhiji|shachadvedhiji]] || [[word:shachadvedhishi|shachadvedhishi]] || [[word:shachadvedhiki|shachadvedhiki]]
